description.ko: 극한의 수압과 완전한 어둠 속에서 생체 발광 센서를 이용해 마리아나 해구의 미답지 영역을 탐사하도록 설계된 첨단 잠수정 유닛입니다.
description.en: An advanced submersible unit designed for extreme pressure and total darkness, exploring the uncharted depths of the Mariana Trench with bioluminescent sensors.

prompt: High-tech submersible robot AQUA-5 navigating a glowing bioluminescent coral reef in the midnight zone of the ocean, volumetric lighting, particles of marine snow, cinematic underwater photography, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic, deep blue and neon cyan accents.
